pastEvents.title: Guns N Roses
pastEvents.review: Slash and Axl back together is everything — Welcome to the Jungle live is on another level. One of the loudest crowds I've ever been in.

pastEvents.title: Born of Osiris & Veil of Maya
pastEvents.review: Tight, heavy set from both bands. Nile Theater is the perfect size for this kind of show — close enough to feel the riffs physically.

pastEvents.title: Cosmic Gate
pastEvents.review: Solid trance set with good energy. Great track selection from the classic catalog and the crowd was locked in all night.

pastEvents.title: AWOLNATION
pastEvents.review: Sail live is an experience on its own. Halloween weekend added to the energy and the crowd was absolutely electric.

pastEvents.title: Coldplay
pastEvents.review: The LED wristbands turned the whole stadium into a living light show. More of a full sensory experience than a concert — nothing else comes close visually.

pastEvents.title: Eric Prydz
pastEvents.review: First Prydz show and completely blown away by the production. HOLO visuals in that room hit different — left genuinely speechless.

pastEvents.title: Eric Prydz
pastEvents.review: Warehouse setting added a grittier dimension to the show. Different energy from Big Night Live but the set was immaculate from start to finish.

pastEvents.title: Eric Prydz
pastEvents.review: Came back for a second time at Big Night Live and it somehow hit harder. Different set, same jaw-dropping production — worth every trip.

pastEvents.title: Ben Bohmer
pastEvents.review: Emotional and euphoric in equal measure. Ben Bohmer live is a completely different experience from the records — the builds pull you in and don't let go.

pastEvents.title: Ultra Music Festival 2023
pastEvents.review: Three days of non-stop electronic music with a lineup that was genuinely unreal. Prydz closing a stage was the highlight but the energy across every set was immense.

artists.name: Armin van Buuren
setlist: This Is What It Feels Like
We Are Here to Make Some Noise

pastEvents.title: The Weeknd
pastEvents.review: Massive stage production and incredible presence throughout. Blinding Lights and Starboy live in a packed stadium is something you carry with you.

settings.musicPassionDescription: Music has always been a huge part of my life alongside gaming and chess. I love attending live concerts and experiencing the energy of music festivals. From intimate acoustic sessions to massive stadium shows, each event offers a unique experience that connects people through the power of music.
